docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-31-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-31-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF CHRISTAIN KENDALL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GETAROUND, INC. REPRESENTED BY MEGHAN MURRAY, HEAD OF COMMUNITY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KENDALL, CHRISTIAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GETAROUND, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-31-2017 - JUDGMENT.
